title: memecylon ochroleucum
intro: Memecylon ochroleucum, also known as the White-leaved Memecylon, is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to Sri Lanka and is known for its white, fragrant flowers and white, waxy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Memecylon ochroleucum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing.
